Key Features

Everything in One Bot

Cucumverse puts full multi-wallet control and bulk trade execution inside a single Telegram bot — one command fires trades across every wallet simultaneously. No coding, no complex setup, just results.

👛

Multi-Wallet Control

Connect and operate multiple wallets simultaneously. Assign roles — main, buyer, or distribution — and automate fund allocation across all wallets at once. Every wallet moves together, not one at a time.

⚙️

Per-Wallet Trade Configuration

Configure buy/sell amounts, slippage tolerance, gas fees, and trade sizing individually per wallet — so when you fire a bulk execution, each wallet trades exactly how you set it up.

📈

Coordinated Volume Strategy

Trigger buy activity across all your wallets at the same time with configurable timing and intervals — creating organic-looking volume patterns through coordinated, simultaneous multi-wallet execution.

🎯

Pump.fun Volume Maker

Enter newly launched Pump.fun tokens at full speed. Priority transaction execution positions all your wallets simultaneously — bulk buying across the board before the crowd even moves.

💰

Bulk Fund Distribution

Fund all your wallets in one action. Distribute SOL from your main wallet to every buyer wallet simultaneously — no manual transfers, no repetition. All wallets funded and ready to trade in seconds.

⚡

Bulk Buy & Sell Execution

One command. Every wallet trades at once. Bulk buy or bulk sell across all wallets in a single execution — multiple trades fire simultaneously with no repetition, no delays, and no manual effort.

Use Cases

Built for Creators & Traders

Whether you're launching a token or trading one, Cucumverse has a strategy for you.

For Token Creators

Shape Your Market

  • Simulate realistic transaction volume across multiple wallets instantly
  • Execute bulk buys and coordinated sells in one command
  • Control timing, intervals, and trade sizes across all wallets at once
  • Distribute funds and manage all wallets from a single dashboard
Bulk buy across multiple wallets simultaneously, drive initial volume, boost token visibility, and shape market perception — all in a single execution.
Get Started
For Token Buyers / Traders

Execute With Precision

  • Bulk buy or sell across multiple wallets in a single execution
  • Set custom slippage, limits, and gas fees per wallet
  • Enter newly launched tokens across all wallets simultaneously
  • Distribute and manage funds across your entire wallet portfolio
Manage multiple wallets, execute bulk trades across all of them in one go, and run complex multi-wallet strategies with full precision and control.
Start Trading
Step-by-Step

Get Started in Minutes

No technical setup needed. Just open Telegram and follow these steps.

01

Open the Bot

Launch Telegram, search for @cucumverse_bot, and tap /start to initialize. The bot will greet you with wallet options.

02

Create or Import Main Wallet

Create a fresh wallet or import your existing one using your private key. This becomes your main wallet — the source of all funds.

⚠️ Never share your private key with anyone.
03

Generate Bot Wallets

Choose how many bot wallets to generate. Each wallet acts as an independent buyer. The bot provides a downloadable .txt backup file — save it in case of crashes or accidental deletion.

04

Distribute SOL to Bot Wallets

Send SOL from your main wallet to all bot wallets in one action. For example: distribute 0.5 SOL across 10 wallets = 0.05 SOL each. Check wallet balances anytime from the bot.

05

Configure Trading Settings

Set your trading parameters before launching: Slippage (e.g. 10% for faster fills), Min Buy (e.g. 0.01 SOL), Max Buy (e.g. 0.035 SOL), and Sell Percent — the profit % at which bots auto-sell. Always leave enough SOL per wallet for gas fees.

06

Start Trading

Hit Start Trading. The bot will ask you to paste a token contract address. Find a token on PumpFun, copy its address, and paste it — all bot wallets execute buys simultaneously, instantly.

✅ Non-sniper execution — undetectable on PumpFun.
07

Monitor Your Positions

View all bot wallet balances and token holdings from the bot at any time. Check the live token price and info of the token you're trading directly within the bot.

08

Sell & Collect Profits

Bots auto-sell at your set profit percentage, or you can trigger a manual sell across all wallets at once. Volume pumps, profits collect — all from one Telegram command.

🚀 Works for your own token or any PumpFun token.
